candidates.why: This is the only operating D&A-like row visible before operating profit, but there is no selected COGS reference bucket and nothing in the label ties it to cost of sales/cost of revenue. Conservatively do not assign it to COGS to avoid misclassification or double counting.

variables.notes: No COGS rows were previously selected, and the visible depreciation row is not explicitly linked to COGS/COR.

candidates.why: This is a separate operating depreciation line shown above operating profit and sits alongside the selected SG&A component rows rather than appearing as a nested sub-component of them. Relative to the selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket, it appears to be an additional operating D&A row that should be added separately later.

variables.notes: Selected the standalone operating depreciation row for SG&A/overhead. No separate R&D D&A row is shown, so nothing additional is included for R&D-specific amortization.
